content: Compliance check for T49 OnboardingDelivery: (1) DNA-1 — all data as Record<string,unknown>? (2) DNA-3 — no throw for business logic? (3) DNA-4 — extends MicroserviceBase? (4) DNA-5 — tenantId on all operations? (5) DNA-8 — storeDocument() before each step advancement? (6) FABRIC-FIRST — ITenantRegistry used for workspace, not raw INSERT? (7) FABRIC-FIRST — IScopedMemoryService used for workspace idempotency?
